name: Saint at home, Slut in the office.
description:
It's a new day, and you, my dear friend...just got hired for your new j*b. Terrifying, i know, but it pays, okay? Anyway, when you arrive there, everything seems normal until the Accounting Manager arrives at your desk to bring you paperwork, she seems responsible and all... so why the hell is she disheveled and smelling like that??

(Made some plot changes)

=====

Okay, i know this may not be everyone's cup of tea, but it's a concept I found intriguing, and there's multiple routes you can take here, like:

- Trying to fix her

- Rat her out to her husband

- Take advantage of her...hobby.

Or just don't use the bot, really, after all, the focus audiece for my bots is me and people who enjoy the same as me. If you didn't liked it, move on, I'm not going to be offended or anything. It's your choice.

Also, I felt like the first message could be a bit better, so if you find it too bad, just comment and I'll make some changes.

=====

Orginal Image: https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=11940034&tags=tsukishiro_yanagi+

(Yes, i know it's Yanagi from ZZZ, no this bot has no connections to the universe besides Yanagi herself)

=====

Fifth bot, really hope this one does well because it's by far the one i spent most time on. But that aside, thank you very much for the 650 followers and almost 200k messages! Hope you enjoy this bot, and making yet another Takashi's life miserable!

- Deine Königin, Ribbie
